2125320.name: Squirrels Forest Race
2125320.description:
This is a magical Squirrel Forest! The squirrels live peacefully there, protected by the mountains and the large trees that surround it.



Many years ago, some wild squirrels, while looking for food, found a very different nut. And they began to develop powers, which made them strong and very intelligent.
They realized that this nut is produced only once a year by a peculiar tree, located right in the center of the forest. They called it the Golden Tree, for the shine of its leaves and nuts.



One day they realized that there was something strange about the tree. Worried and without understanding why, they called the most intelligent squirrels in the forest to help find out what was happening.



When the squirrels were analyzing the golden tree, all the nuts started to emit a very bright glow. And right in front of the squirrels, the nuts broke free from the branches and rose very high, until they reached the sky. And with all speed, they each flew to a tree, creating magical doors with passages to the most incredible races ever seen.



Now you need to find out where these magical doors are and win the races to recover all the nuts.

Choose your favorite squirrel! Run as fast as you can and get ready for the challenges ahead!



Welcome to the Squirrels Forest!!!
2125320.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
